source.cookbook: The Vegan Korean   Complete Guide And Cookbook so
source.author: Various

ingredients.item:
1 pound peeled and washed Korean sweet potato, roll cut into ½ to 1 inch thick pieces
	⅓ cup white sugar
	cooking oil (vegetable, grape seeds, or corn oil) for making syrup and frying
	1 tsp toasted black sesame seeds (optional)
ingredients.original:
1 pound peeled and washed Korean sweet potato, roll cut into ½ to 1 inch thick pieces
	⅓ cup white sugar
	cooking oil (vegetable, grape seeds, or corn oil) for making syrup and frying
	1 tsp toasted black sesame seeds (optional)
